summary_en: 6,900,000 shares acquired (1.39% of S/O) for ¥99.9B as of 2025-01-31 under authorization approved 2024-11-29. Authorized acquisition limit: 10,000,000 shares (approximately 2.0% of S/O) for up to ¥150B through 2025-03-31 via open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime. 69% of share count limit consumed; 66.6% of yen budget consumed.
title_en: Notice of Status of Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Sumitomo Corporation filed a progress report on its share buyback program as of 31 January 2025. The company has acquired 6,900,000 common shares for a total of ¥99.9 billion under the acquisition program authorized by the Board of Directors on 29 November 2024. The authorized acquisition limit comprises 10,000,000 shares (approximately 2.0% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for up to ¥150 billion, with execution through 31 March 2025 via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime (ToSTNeT-3 method). As of the reporting date, 69% of the authorized share count and 66.6% of the authorized yen budget have been consumed. A stock split effective 1 April 2025 will adjust the upper limit on share acquisitions to 20,000,000 shares.
